changes.summary: Added a Stage1RunStarted signal and direct room reset to child_room when starting a new Stage 1 run.
Subscribes to Stage1RunStarted and changes to the Stage 1 start room.
Subscribes to Stage1RunStarted and resets inventory and selected item.
Subscribes to Stage1RunStarted and resets runtime flags and danger level while preserving StageDefinition initial flags.
Subscribes to Stage1RunStarted and closes active puzzle UI state.
Subscribes to Stage1RunStarted and resets hiding state and capture gauge.
Subscribes to Stage1RunStarted and resets monster state to Normal.
Keeps the GameOverUI scene instance active and hidden by CanvasGroup so it can subscribe to GameStateManager state changes.
Added button-driven restart coverage for GameOverUI visibility, runtime resets, room reset, inventory reset, event flag reset, monster/hiding reset, and no stage1_clear persistence.

findings.details: Executed inventory, puzzle, event, hiding, monster, and GameOverUI seeders. Unity logs confirmed all seeders.
Unity MCP PlayMode test job 2cc62fe241ff47d79345ec012bf677e0 passed the focused GameOverRestartButton_ResetsRunStateWithoutSavingProgress test.
No C# compile errors were reported after the final compile. Console included MCP lifecycle entries and normal test-result output.
Unity MCP EditMode test job 9a7582ef08a44e66a6deb0710056c9be passed 6/6 tests.
Unity MCP PlayMode test job 9fbe57b302d142f0bc14b1b128701751 passed 12/12 tests.
